hook.name: FloorPad Floor Hook
hook.description: Singleton Uniswap v4 hook serving all FloorPad memecoins (per-pool state keyed by poolId). On each buy, diverts a dynamic cut of the WETH input into a per-pool vault and fees to protocol/creator; on each sell, skims a fee from the WETH output. The vault backs a WETH-per-token redemption floor that ratchets up only on buys; holders can burn coins to redeem at the floor at any time.
